comment: Fleet registry for the cold-start pinger (.github/workflows/coldstart-pinger.yml). Apps with `health: true` run nextrs >= 0.3.7 and answer /__nx/health with boot_id/uptime/first_request — the pinger classifies cold vs warm from those. Apps with `health: false` predate the endpoint; the pinger records response time only until they upgrade.

apps.name: react-todos
apps.note: flip to health:true when nextrs 0.3.7 is published and the app redeployed
